allow: Bash(mysql --version 2>/dev/null || echo "mysql cli not in PATH")
Bash(curl --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 && mvn --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 && java -version 2>&1 | head -1)
Bash(find "C:/Program Files/MySQL" -name "*.jar" 2>/dev/null; find "C:/Users/Leo" -name "*.jar" 2>/dev/null | grep -i mysql | head -5; echo "---fim---")

Bash(BASE="C:/Users/Leo/OneDrive/Área de Trabalho/TrabFinal"
SRC="$BASE/src"
BIN="$BASE/bin"
LIB="$BASE/lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar"

rm -rf "$BIN"
mkdir -p "$BIN"

javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp "$LIB" -d "$BIN" \\
  "$SRC/entities/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/enums/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/exceptions/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/interfaces/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/validators/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/db/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/repositories/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/repositories/mysql/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/services/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/ui/swing/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/App.java" 2>&1)
